rows.label: qev025702_MSG0001
rows.name:
What, what?! Do you have some
kind of business with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0002
rows.name:
I don't have a job anyway, and
I'm free all day today, so I'll
keep you company for whatever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Beberta for her three sizes.

rows.label: qev025702_SEL0021
rows.name: Express concern for Beberta's lack of a job.

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0003
rows.name:
Are you a friend of Panyal's? I'll
tell you anything you want, but
what exactly are three sizes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0004
rows.name:
...The size of my chest, waist, and hips? If
that's all, I'll tell you as much as you want!
Wait right here, I'll go measure them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0005
rows.name:
Here! These are my three sizes! But really,
what are you going to use this for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Eh, underwear?! What's that? It sounds
kinda interesting, doesn't it?! Once it's
done, I want to try wearing it too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0007
rows.name:
Thanks for worrying! But it's
fine, my mom and dad have
proper jobs, so I'm okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0008
rows.name:
Wearing clothes under your clothes, what
a strange and interesting thing! Once it's
done, I want to try wearing it too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0009
rows.name:
How did the underwear turn out?
Did you make something wonderful?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Eh, it was a failure?!
I see, what a shame.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025702_MSG0011
rows.name:
Oh, no need to hold back with me.
I was free without a job anyway,
so it was a little bit fun.[ST:wait ]
